channel.title: Studio on ankitdaf's Space
channel.description: Recent content in Studio on ankitdaf's Space

item.title: Making The PhonePe SmartSpeaker
item.description:
I’ve had a lot of fun conversations discussing about what it takes to make a product of the scale and complexity as the PhonePe SmartSpeaker, and when I started writing what it takes, I quickly realised that writing it as a blog post or even a series of blog posts wouldn’t do justice to the complexity and interconnected-ness of everything that goes in.

Luckily, I found the perfect tool for this - a mindmap. I’ve tried to capture the essence of everything that goes into making a product like this. Instead of providing answers (some of which are highly specific to context, and some of which are proprietary), I’ve provided a set of questions to help navigate the complexity of building and maintaining this product.

item.title: MacroPad
item.description:
I built out innovative computer accessories for power users with the team at Kreo Tech, focusing on ease and convenience.

The products focused on use cases like

  • Media Editing and Creativity
  • AI assisted coding
  • High Speed Stock Trading

The products are designed and assembled in Bangalore, India.

item.title: MarketEye
item.description:
Product Link : MarketEye

MarketEye helps you manage your investments effortlessly by watching the market for you in real time and assists you in taking action in a timely manner.

Price Drop Alert

Busy professionals often pick good stocks but fail to exit on time because they’re too busy on their day job. Price drop alert prevents profits from turning into losses by alerting you when you need to exit.

  • Setting up alerts is a 2-click process
  • Trailing the price on the way up lets users keep more of their profits
  • Exiting on time allows users to have some cash to buy the dip or other opportunities at reasonable valuations
  • Notifications are supported on Email and Whatsapp

Unlisted Stocks

Invest in select,promising unlisted stocks before they go public
